achraf-hakimi.name: Achraf Hakimi
achraf-hakimi.summary: Achraf Hakimi Mouh is a professional footballer who plays as a right-back forLigue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and captains the Morocco national team. He is widely regarded as one of the best right-backs in the world.

adrien-rabiot.name: Adrien Rabiot
adrien-rabiot.summary: Adrien Thibault Marie Rabiot is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club AC Milan and the France national team.

alessandro-bastoni.name: Alessandro Bastoni
alessandro-bastoni.summary: Alessandro Bastoni is an Italian professional footballer who plays primarily as a centre-back for Serie A club Inter Milan and the Italy national team. Regarded as one of the best centre-backs in the world, he is best known for his passing, speed and versatility.

alexis-mac-allister.name: Alexis Mac Allister
alexis-mac-allister.summary: Alexis Mac Allister is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Argentina national team. Considered as one of the best midfielders in the world, he is known for his passing, shooting ability, and versatility.

alvaro-morata.name: Álvaro Morata
alvaro-morata.summary: Álvaro Borja Morata Martín is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club Como, on loan from AC Milan. He also captains the Spain national team.

amine-harit.name: Amine Harit
amine-harit.summary: Amine Harit is a professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Süper Lig club İstanbul Başakşehir, on loan from Marseille. Born in France, he plays for the Morocco national team.

angel-di-maria.name: Ángel Di María
angel-di-maria.summary: Ángel Fabián Di María is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Argentine Primera División club Rosario Central. Widely regarded as one of the greatest Argentine players of all time and one of the greatest wingers of his generation, Di María is known for his dribbling ability, playmaking, rapid pace and agility. He is the all-time Argentine top assist provider in the UEFA Champions League (41) and ranks second overall.

antoine-griezmann.name: Antoine Griezmann
antoine-griezmann.summary: Antoine Griezmann is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for La Liga club Atlético Madrid. Considered one of the best players of his generation, he is primarily known for his versatility, game intelligence, attacking output, and off-ball attributes. He will formally join Major League Soccer club Orlando City in July 2026.

antonio-rudiger.name: Antonio Rüdiger
antonio-rudiger.summary: Antonio Rüdiger is a German professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Germany national team. He is known for his aggressive playing style, speed, tackling ability and strong aerial presence.

antonio-silva.name: António Silva
antonio-silva.summary:
Antonio Silva, António Silva or Antônio Silva can refer to:António Costa Silva, Portuguese businessman and politician
António Silva (actor) (1886–1971), Portuguese actor
Antônio Silva, Brazilian football manager
Antônio Silva (fighter), Brazilian mixed martial artist
António Silva (footballer), Portuguese football defender
Antônio Tenório Silva, Brazilian judoka
Toñito Silva, Puerto Rican politician
Tony Silva, American aviculturist

bremer.name: Bremer
bremer.description: Topics referred to by the same term

brian-brobbey.name: Brian Brobbey
brian-brobbey.summary: Brian Ebenezer Adjei Brobbey is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Sunderland and the Netherlands national team.

bruno-fernandes.name: Bruno Fernandes
bruno-fernandes.summary: Bruno Miguel Borges Fernandes is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Premier League club Manchester United, which he captains, and the Portugal national team. Known for his creative output, vision, goal scoring ability, and passing, he is widely regarded as one of the best attacking midfielders in the world.

bukayo-saka.name: Bukayo Saka
bukayo-saka.summary: Bukayo Ayoyinka Temidayo Moses Saka is an English professional footballer who plays as a right winger for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team.

chancel-mbemba.name: Chancel Mbemba
chancel-mbemba.summary: Chancel Mangulu Mbemba is a Congolese professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Ligue 1 club Lille and the DR Congo national team, of which he is the captain.

christian-pulisic.name: Christian Pulisic
christian-pulisic.summary: Christian Mate Pulisic is an American professional soccer player who plays as a winger, attacking midfielder and forward for Serie A club AC Milan and the United States national team. Regarded as one of the best North American players of all time, he is nicknamed "Captain America" and known for his dribbling, directness, and playmaking.

christopher-nkunku.name: Christopher Nkunku
christopher-nkunku.summary: Christopher Alan Nkunku is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward, attacking midfielder and winger for Serie A club AC Milan and the France national team.

cole-palmer.name: Cole Palmer
cole-palmer.summary: Cole Jermaine Palmer is an English professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Chelsea and the England national team. Known for his dribbling and passing ability, he is widely regarded as one of the best attacking midfielders in the world.

cristian-romero.name: Cristian Romero
cristian-romero.summary: Cristian Gabriel Romero is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur, which he captains, and the Argentina national team.

darwin-nunez.name: Darwin Núñez
darwin-nunez.summary: Darwin Gabriel Núñez Ribeiro is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a forward for Saudi Pro League club Al-Hilal and the Uruguay national team.

declan-rice.name: Declan Rice
declan-rice.summary: Declan Rice is an English professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the England national team. Known for his versatility, stamina, ball-carrying and tackling, he is considered one of the best midfielders in the world.

dejan-kulusevski.name: Dejan Kulusevski
dejan-kulusevski.summary: Dejan Kuluševski is a Swedish professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or winger for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the Sweden national team.

dusan-vlahovic.name: Dušan Vlahović
dusan-vlahovic.summary: Dušan Vlahović is a Serbian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club Juventus and the Serbia national team.

enzo-fernandez.name: Enzo Fernández
enzo-fernandez.summary: Enzo Jeremías Fernández is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Chelsea and the Argentina national team. Primarily a central midfielder, he is also capable of playing as a defensive or attacking midfielder.

erling-haaland.name: Erling Haaland
erling-haaland.summary: Erling Braut Haaland is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Premier League club Manchester City and the Norway national team. Considered one of the best players in the world, and the greatest Norwegian player ever, he is known for his speed, strength, positioning, and finishing inside the box.

federico-chiesa.name: Federico Chiesa
federico-chiesa.summary: Federico Chiesa is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a forward and winger for Premier League club Liverpool and the Italy national team.

federico-valverde.name: Federico Valverde
federico-valverde.summary: Federico Santiago Valverde Dipetta is a Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Uruguay national team. Known for his versatility, work rate, pace and shooting, he is considered as one of the best midfielders in the world. Valverde mainly plays as a central midfielder but is also able to play as a right-back.

florian-wirtz.name: Florian Wirtz
florian-wirtz.summary: Florian Richard Wirtz is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder or left midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Germany national team. He is widely regarded as one of the best attacking midfielders in the world.

giovanni-di-lorenzo.name: Giovanni Di Lorenzo
giovanni-di-lorenzo.summary: Giovanni Di Lorenzo is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Serie A club Napoli, which he captains, and the Italy national team.

granit-xhaka.name: Granit Xhaka
granit-xhaka.summary: Granit Xhaka is a Swiss professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for and captains both Premier League club Sunderland and the Switzerland national team.

hakan-calhanoglu.name: Hakan Çalhanoğlu
hakan-calhanoglu.summary: Hakan Çalhanoğlu is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Inter Milan. Born in Germany, he plays for and captains the Turkey national team.

harry-kane.name: Harry Kane
harry-kane.summary: Harry Edward Kane is an English professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and captains the England national team. Regarded as one of the best strikers of his generation, he is Tottenham Hotspur's all-time top goalscorer (280), England's all-time top goalscorer (78), and the highest-scoring English player in the UEFA Champions League (53). He is also the Premier League's second-highest all-time goalscorer (213) and the 10th highest goalscorer for Bayern Munich (139). He has scored over 500 career goals for club and country.

heung-min-son.name: Heung-Min Son
heung-min-son.summary: Son Heung-min is a South Korean professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Major League Soccer club Los Angeles FC and captains the South Korea national team. Known for his speed, finishing, two-footedness, and ability to link play, he is the top Asian goalscorer in both Premier League and UEFA Champions League history, and is widely regarded as the greatest Asian player of all time.

jamal-musiala.name: Jamal Musiala
jamal-musiala.summary: Jamal Musiala is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and the Germany national team. Widely regarded as one of the best attacking midfielders in the world, Musiala is known for his dribbling, passing, goal threat, and technical skills, and is nicknamed "Bambi" for his close-control dribbling.

james-maddison.name: James Maddison
james-maddison.summary: James Daniel Maddison is an English professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Premier League club Tottenham Hotspur and the England national team.

jan-oblak.name: Jan Oblak
jan-oblak.summary: Jan Oblak is a Slovenian professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for La Liga club Atlético Madrid and captains the Slovenia national team.

jeremie-frimpong.name: Jeremie Frimpong
jeremie-frimpong.summary: Jeremie Agyekum Frimpong is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a right-back or right midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team.

joao-mario.name: João Mário
joao-mario.description: Topics referred to by the same term

jordan-veretout.name: Jordan Veretout
jordan-veretout.summary: Jordan Marcel Gilbert Veretout is a French professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Qatar Stars League club Al-Arabi.

jorrel-hato.name: Jorrel Hato
jorrel-hato.summary: Jorrel Evan Hato is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back or left-back for Premier League club Chelsea and the Netherlands national team.

joshua-kimmich.name: Joshua Kimmich
joshua-kimmich.summary: Joshua Walter Kimmich is a German professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder or right-back for Bundesliga club Bayern Munich and captains the Germany national team. Known for his versatility, aggression and playmaking ability, Kimmich has been compared with former Bayern Munich and Germany captain Philipp Lahm.

jude-bellingham.name: Jude Bellingham
jude-bellingham.summary: Jude Victor William Bellingham is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Real Madrid and the England national team. Known for his exceptional work rate, playmaking ability, interceptions and fast dribbling, he is widely regarded as one of the best players in the world.

julian-brandt.name: Julian Brandt
julian-brandt.summary: Julian Brandt is a German professional footballer who plays as a left winger or attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Germany national team.

kai-havertz.name: Kai Havertz
kai-havertz.summary: Kai Lukas Havertz is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward or attacking midfielder for Premier League club Arsenal and the Germany national team.

karim-adeyemi.name: Karim Adeyemi
karim-adeyemi.summary: Karim David Adeyemi is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger or forward for Bundesliga club Borussia Dortmund and the Germany national team.

kenneth-taylor.name: Kenneth Taylor
kenneth-taylor.summary: Kenneth, Kenny or Ken Taylor may refer to:
kenneth-taylor.description: Topics referred to by the same term

kevin-de-bruyne.name: Kevin De Bruyne
kevin-de-bruyne.summary: Kevin De Bruyne is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Serie A club Napoli and the Belgium national team. Widely regarded as one of the best players of his generation and one of the best players in Premier League history, De Bruyne has been described as a "complete" footballer. He is tied with Ferenc Puskás as the all-time leading European assist provider in international football (53).

khvicha-kvaratskhelia.name: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia
khvicha-kvaratskhelia.summary: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia is a Georgian professional footballer who plays as a left winger for Ligue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and captains the Georgia national team. Regarded as one of the best wingers in the world and as one of the greatest Georgian players of all time, he is known for his dribbling, agility, and playmaking.

kylian-mbappe.name: Kylian Mbappé
kylian-mbappe.summary: Kylian Mbappé Lottin is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Real Madrid and captains the France national team. He is known for his pace, dribbling, and clinical finishing, and is widely regarded as one of the best players in the world.

lamine-yamal.name: Lamine Yamal
lamine-yamal.summary: Lamine Yamal Nasraoui Ebana is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team. Known for his flair, chance creation, and long-distance curling goals, he is widely regarded as one of the best players in the world.

lautaro-martinez.name: Lautaro Martínez
lautaro-martinez.summary: Lautaro Javier Martínez is an Argentine professional footballer who plays as a centre-forward for and captains Serie A club Inter Milan, and the Argentina national team.

leroy-sane.name: Leroy Sané
leroy-sane.summary: Leroy Aziz Sané is a German professional footballer who plays as a winger for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and the Germany national team.

lisandro-martinez.name: Lisandro Martínez
lisandro-martinez.summary: Lisandro Martínez is an Argentine professional footballer who plays primarily as a centre-back for Premier League club Manchester United and the Argentina national team. Nicknamed "The Butcher", he is known for his aggressive style of play and accurate long passes from the back.

marcus-rashford.name: Marcus Rashford
marcus-rashford.summary: Marcus Rashford is an English professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Barcelona, on loan from Premier League club Manchester United, and the England national team.

martin-degaard.name: Martin Ødegaard
martin-degaard.summary: Martin Ødegaard is a Norwegian professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for and captains both Premier League club Arsenal and the Norway national team.

mats-hummels.name: Mats Hummels
mats-hummels.summary: Mats Julian Hummels is a German former professional footballer who played as a centre-back. Considered one of the best defenders of his generation, he was known for his tackling, anticipation, goal scoring ability and deadly crosses.

mike-maignan.name: Mike Maignan
mike-maignan.summary: Mike Peterson Maignan is a French professional footballer who plays as a goalkeeper for Serie A club AC Milan, which he captains, and the France national team.

mohamed-salah.name: Mohamed Salah
mohamed-salah.summary: Mohamed Salah Hamed Mahrous Ghaly is an Egyptian professional footballer who plays as a right winger or right midfielder for Premier League club Liverpool and captains the Egypt national team. He is widely regarded as one of the best players of his generation and one of the greatest wingers of all time. Dubbed the "Egyptian King", he is the all-time top foreign goalscorer in the Premier League and the all-time top African goalscorer in the UEFA Champions League.

niclas-fullkrug.name: Niclas Füllkrug
niclas-fullkrug.summary: Niclas Füllkrug is a German professional footballer who plays as a forward for Serie A club AC Milan, on loan from Premier League club West Ham United. He also plays for the Germany national team.

nicolo-barella.name: Nicolò Barella
nicolo-barella.summary: Nicolò Barella is an Italian professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Serie A club Inter Milan and the Italy national team. Known for his technical ability, work rate, and creativity, he is often recognised as one of the best midfielders in the world.

ousmane-dembele.name: Ousmane Dembélé
ousmane-dembele.summary: Masour Ousmane Dembélé is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward or right winger forLigue 1 club Paris Saint-Germain and the France national team. Considered one of the best players in the world, he is one of ten players to have won the FIFA World Cup, UEFA Champions League, and Ballon d'Or in their career.

pedri.name: Pedri
pedri.summary: Pedro González López, more commonly known as Pedri, is a Spanish professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for La Liga club Barcelona and the Spain national team. Considered as one of the best midfielders in the world, he is known for his ball control, dribbling, passing and playmaking.

phil-foden.name: Phil Foden
phil-foden.summary: Philip Walter Foden is an English professional footballer who plays as a midfielder for Premier League club Manchester City and the England national team.

pierre-emerick-aubameyang.name: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang
pierre-emerick-aubameyang.summary: Pierre-Emerick Emiliano François Aubameyang is a professional footballer who plays as a striker for Ligue 1 club Marseille and the Gabon national team.

rafa-silva.name: Rafa Silva
rafa-silva.summary: Rafael Alexandre Fernandes Ferreira da Silva, known as Rafa Silva or simply Rafa, is a Portuguese footballer who plays as a winger or second striker for Primeira Liga club Benfica.

rafael-leao.name: Rafael Leão
rafael-leao.summary: Rafael Alexandre da Conceição Leão is a Portuguese professional footballer who plays as a left winger and forward for Serie A club AC Milan and the Portugal national team. He is known for his dribbling and speed.

rasmus-h-jlund.name: Rasmus Højlund
rasmus-h-jlund.summary: Rasmus Winther Højlund is a Danish professional footballer who plays as a striker for Serie A club Napoli, on loan from Premier League club Manchester United, and the Denmark national team.

reece-james.name: Reece James
reece-james.summary: Reece Lewis James is an English professional footballer who plays as a right-back for Premier League club Chelsea, which he captains, and the England national team.

robert-lewandowski.name: Robert Lewandowski
robert-lewandowski.summary: Robert Lewandowski is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a striker for La Liga club Barcelona and captains the Poland national team. Widely regarded as one of the greatest strikers of all time, he is one of only five players to have scored 100 goals with three different clubs, ranks third for the all-time top goalscorers in the UEFA Champions League with 109 goals, and ranks third for the all-time European men's top goal scorers in international football (89). He has scored over 700 senior career goals for club and country.

rodrigo-de-paul.name: Rodrigo De Paul
rodrigo-de-paul.summary: Rodrigo Javier De Paul is an Argentine professional football player who plays as a midfielder for Major League Soccer club Inter Miami and the Argentina national team.

ronald-araujo.name: Ronald Araújo
ronald-araujo.summary: Ronald Federico Araújo da Silva is an Uruguayan professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for La Liga club Barcelona, whom he captains, and the Uruguay national team.

stanislav-lobotka.name: Stanislav Lobotka
stanislav-lobotka.summary: Stanislav Lobotka is a Slovak professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Serie A club Napoli and the Slovakia national team.

steven-bergwijn.name: Steven Bergwijn
steven-bergwijn.summary: Steven Charles Bergwijn  is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a left winger or a forward for Saudi Pro League club Al-Ittihad.

theo-hernandez.name: Theo Hernández
theo-hernandez.summary: Théo Bernard François Hernandez is a French professional footballer who plays primarily as a left-back for Saudi Pro League club Al Hilal and the France national team. He is known for his speed, dribbling, and goal scoring ability.

victor-boniface.name: Victor Boniface
victor-boniface.summary: Victor Okoh Boniface is a Nigerian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Bundesliga club Werder Bremen, on loan from Bayer Leverkusen, and the Nigeria national team.

victor-osimhen.name: Victor Osimhen
victor-osimhen.summary: Victor James Osimhen is a Nigerian professional footballer who plays as a striker for Süper Lig club Galatasaray and is the vice-captain of the Nigeria national team. He is widely regarded as one of the best strikers in the world. Osimhen is known for his explosive pace, physical strength, aerial ability, and clinical finishing.

vinicius-junior.name: Vinícius Júnior
vinicius-junior.summary: Vinícius José Paixão de Oliveira Júnior, commonly known as Vinícius Júnior or Vini Jr., is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a forward for La Liga club Real Madrid and the Brazil national team. Considered one of the best players in the world, he is known for his pace, technique and dribbling ability.

virgil-van-dijk.name: Virgil van Dijk
virgil-van-dijk.summary: Virgil van Dijk is a Dutch professional footballer who plays as a centre-back for and captains both Premier League club Liverpool and the Netherlands national team. Widely regarded as one of the best defenders of his generation, and one of the greatest defenders in Premier League history, he is known for his strength, leadership, speed and aerial ability.

vitinha.summary:
